identityOneLiner: Read-only checks at verify time—not color.
heroSubtitle: Tool effects vs read-only store facts.
visitorProblemAnswer:
Traces can show success while stored data disagrees.

AgentSkeptic re-checks the stores your agent claims to change, then returns a deterministic Outcome Certificate before you ship.
heroOutcome: Agents can report success while the database is still wrong.
heroMechanism: AgentSkeptic re-checks your real stores and fails CI before missing writes reach production.
guaranteeFootnote: Read-only checks; not which call wrote.

siteDefaultMetadata.title: AgentSkeptic
siteDefaultMetadata.description: Tool activity vs downstream state at verify: SQL, HTTP, vectors, documents, S3 objects—deterministic verdict artifacts (verification-state-stores.md).

pageMetadata.title: Traces vs state
pageMetadata.description: Tool activity vs downstream state at verify: SQL, HTTP, vectors, documents, S3 objects—deterministic verdict artifacts (verification-state-stores.md).

shareableTerminalDemo.title: Bundled terminal proof
shareableTerminalDemo.transcript:
### Success (`wf_complete`)

workflow_id: wf_complete
workflow_status: complete
trust: TRUSTED: Every step matched registry-backed expected state under the configured verification rules.
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Matched registry-backed expected state.

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_complete",
  "status": "complete",
  "steps": [{ "seq": 0, "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact", "status": "verified" }]
}

### Failure (`wf_missing`)

workflow_id: wf_missing
workflow_status: inconsistent
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Expected state at the verification target was not found (for example a missing row or absent witness result).
    reference_code: ROW_ABSENT

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_missing",
  "status": "inconsistent",
  "steps": [
    {
      "seq": 0,
      "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact",
      "status": "missing",
      "reasons": [{ "code": "ROW_ABSENT" }]
    }
  ]
}

integrate.title: Run your first stored-state verification
integrate.description: Compare your agent's tool claims against actual stored state.

pricing.heroSupporting: Start free. Pay when verification becomes a CI enforcement workflow.
pricing.positioning: Catch bad or missing state before it reaches customers, compliance, or revenue.

claim.title: Claim verification run — AgentSkeptic
claim.description: Link a CLI run to an account.

integratePage.quickVerifyCommand:
npx agentskeptic quick \
  --input path/to/quick-input.ndjson \
  --export-registry path/to/tools.json \
  --db path/to/readable.sqlite \
  --no-human-report
integratePage.packLedCommand:
npx agentskeptic activate --input ./path/to/workflow-bootstrap-input.json \
  --db ./path/to/readable.sqlite \
  --out ./path/to/agent-pack

npx agentskeptic crossing \
  --workflow-id YOUR_WORKFLOW_ID \
  --events ./path/to/events.ndjson \
  --registry ./path/to/tools.json \
  --db ./path/to/readable.sqlite

mechanism.title: How
mechanism.notObservability: State vs claims; not a full APM or log product.

problemIndex.symptom: Trace succeeds, but the Postgres row is missing or stale.
problemIndex.verificationCue: Verify the row before you trust the run.

problemIndex.symptom: Tool loop succeeds, but the CRM record is wrong or missing.
problemIndex.verificationCue: Match tool claims to stored customer data.

problemIndex.symptom: CI passes, but the write never landed.
problemIndex.verificationCue: Fail when expected stored state is absent.

problemIndex.symptom: Add read-only SQL verification before production.
Inspect Postgres after a LangGraph run.
problemIndex.verificationCue: Reconcile trace success with persisted rows.

problemIndex.symptom: Stripe 200, but the ledger row is wrong or missing.
problemIndex.verificationCue: Match webhooks to internal records before settlement.
